scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/rbxts-transform-boost build && bun run --cwd packages/rbxts-transform-luau build
scripts.bench:roblox-ts: bun run build && cd bench && bunx rbxtsc -p tsconfig.roblox-ts.json && bunx rbxtsc -p tsconfig.roblox-ts.notransform.json && cd roblox-ts && rojo build default.project.json -o benchmark.rbxlx
scripts.bench:rotor: bun run build && cd bench && rotor build -p tsconfig.rotor.json && rotor build -p tsconfig.rotor.notransform.json && cd rotor && rojo build default.project.json -o benchmark.rbxlx
scripts.bench:watch:roblox-ts: bun run build && cd bench && bunx rbxtsc -w -p tsconfig.roblox-ts.json
scripts.bench:watch:rotor: bun run build && cd bench && rotor build -w --writeOnlyChanged -p tsconfig.rotor.json
